description: Configure the SeisComP `scevent` module to prevent 'event splitting' of large teleseismic earthquakes. Update the configuration at `/home/ga/seiscomp/etc/scevent.cfg` with the following parameters: `maximumDistance` set to 2.5 degrees, `maximumTimeDifference` to 60.0 seconds, `delayTimeSpan` to 15 seconds, and `magTypes` to the priority list mww, Mwp, Mw, ML, mb. Restart the `scevent` module to apply the changes and ensure it remains running.
